question: What units are available under $3,000 per month?
expected_answer: Units 201-A, 305-B, and 412-A in Tower North are available under $3,000/month, with move-in dates in April 2026.
expected_sql: SELECT unit_id, unit_number, rent, availability_date FROM units WHERE rent < 3000 AND status = 'available' ORDER BY rent ASC
contexts: Tower North contains 250 units. Unit 201-A is a 1BR/1BA listed at $2,850/month available April 15, 2026.
Unit 305-B is a 2BR/1BA listed at $2,950/month available April 1, 2026 in Tower North.
Unit 412-A is a studio listed at $2,750/month available April 20, 2026 in Tower North.

question: Show NOI trend year-over-year for the last three years.
expected_sql: SELECT year, noi, LAG(noi) OVER (ORDER BY year) as prev_noi, ROUND((noi - LAG(noi) OVER (ORDER BY year)) / LAG(noi) OVER (ORDER BY year) * 100, 1) as yoy_growth FROM financial_metrics WHERE year BETWEEN 2023 AND 2025
contexts: 2023 Net Operating Income: $2,100,000 from 350 leased units
2024 Net Operating Income: $2,450,000 representing 16.7% YoY growth
2025 Net Operating Income: $2,890,000 with 18.0% YoY increase

question: Which buildings have the most open work orders?
expected_answer: Tower North has 47 open work orders, Tower South has 32, and East Wing has 18.
expected_sql: SELECT building_name, COUNT(*) as open_orders FROM work_orders WHERE status = 'open' GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY open_orders DESC
contexts: Tower North currently has 47 open maintenance work orders requiring attention
Tower South has 32 pending work orders, mostly HVAC and plumbing related
East Wing has 18 open work orders, primarily preventive maintenance
ground_truth: Open work orders: Tower North 47, Tower South 32, East Wing 18

question: What is the current occupancy rate by building?
expected_answer: Tower North: 96.2%, Tower South: 91.5%, East Wing: 88.3%
expected_sql: SELECT building_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN lease_status = 'active' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as occupancy_rate FROM units GROUP BY building_name ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC
contexts: Tower North: 337 of 350 units occupied (96.2% occupancy)
Tower South: 293 of 320 units occupied (91.5% occupancy)
East Wing: 177 of 200 units occupied (88.3% occupancy)
ground_truth: Occupancy rates match by building percentages

question: List all lease expirations in Q2 2026.
expected_answer: 52 leases expire in Q2: April (18), May (17), June (17). Key expirations include Tower North 201-A, Tower South 305-B.
expected_sql: SELECT MONTH(expiration_date) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM leases WHERE expiration_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-06-30' GROUP BY MONTH(expiration_date) ORDER BY month
contexts: Q2 2026 lease expirations: 18 in April, 17 in May, 17 in June
April expirations include Unit 201-A, Tower North (1BR/$2,850)
May expirations include Unit 305-B, Tower South (2BR/$3,200)
June lease expirations are distributed across all buildings

question: Which tenants have payment issues?
expected_answer: 3 tenants with payment delays: ABC Corp (45 days), XYZ LLC (30 days), Tech Startup Inc (15 days)
expected_sql: SELECT tenant_name, unit_id, DATEDIFF(day, due_date, GETDATE()) as days_overdue FROM rent_payments WHERE status = 'overdue' ORDER BY days_overdue DESC
contexts: ABC Corp (Unit 501) has a 45-day payment delay on March rent
XYZ LLC (Unit 602) is 30 days past due on current rent
Tech Startup Inc (Unit 703) has a 15-day payment delay
ground_truth: 3 tenants with overdue payments ranging 15-45 days

question: What is the total utility cost for March 2026?
expected_answer: Total March 2026 utility costs: $87,500 (Electricity: $42,000, Gas: $28,500, Water: $17,000)
expected_sql: SELECT utility_type, SUM(cost) as total_cost FROM utility_expenses WHERE YEAR(month) = 2026 AND MONTH(month) = 3 GROUP BY utility_type WITH ROLLUP
contexts: March 2026 electricity costs: $42,000 across all buildings
March 2026 gas costs: $28,500 for heating systems
March 2026 water/sewer costs: $17,000

question: Show capital expenditure projects scheduled for Q3 2026.
expected_answer: 4 CapEx projects: Roof replacement Tower North ($450K), HVAC upgrade Tower South ($320K), Parking lot resurfacing ($180K), Lobby renovation ($95K)
expected_sql: SELECT project_name, building_name, budget, scheduled_start FROM capital_projects WHERE status = 'scheduled' AND scheduled_start BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND '2026-09-30'
contexts: Tower North roof replacement project scheduled July 2026 - estimated cost $450,000
Tower South HVAC system upgrade planned August 2026 - $320,000 budget
Parking lot resurfacing project - $180,000, scheduled September 2026
East Wing lobby renovation - $95,000, planned for Q3 2026

question: What are the highest and lowest rental rates?
expected_answer: Highest: Tower North 3BR penthouse at $4,950/month. Lowest: East Wing studio at $1,850/month.
expected_sql: SELECT MIN(rent) as min_rent, MAX(rent) as max_rent, unit_number FROM units GROUP BY unit_number HAVING rent IN (SELECT MIN(rent) FROM units) OR rent IN (SELECT MAX(rent) FROM units)
contexts: Premium units in Tower North command highest rents, penthouse 3BR at $4,950/month
Tower South 2BR units average $3,200/month
East Wing studio units are the most affordable at $1,850/month minimum

question: How many units are in each building by bedroom count?
expected_answer: Tower North: Studios 50, 1BR 100, 2BR 80, 3BR 20. Tower South: Studios 40, 1BR 120, 2BR 140, 3BR 20. East Wing: Studios 80, 1BR 80, 2BR 40.
expected_sql: SELECT building_name, bedroom_count, COUNT(*) as unit_count FROM units GROUP BY building_name, bedroom_count ORDER BY building_name, bedroom_count
contexts: Tower North inventory: 50 studios, 100 one-bedrooms, 80 two-bedrooms, 20 three-bedrooms
Tower South units: 40 studios, 120 one-bedrooms, 140 two-bedrooms, 20 three-bedrooms
East Wing breakdown: 80 studios, 80 one-bedrooms, 40 two-bedrooms
ground_truth: Total 870 units distributed by type and building

question: What is the CAM charge breakdown?
expected_answer: CAM charges: Insurance 35%, Maintenance 32%, Utilities 25%, Property Tax 8%. Average $185/unit/month.
expected_sql: SELECT expense_category, SUM(amount) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM cam_expenses) as percentage, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) as avg_per_unit FROM cam_expenses GROUP BY expense_category
contexts: CAM insurance component: 35% of total CAM charges
Maintenance services: 32% of CAM allocation
Utilities embedded in CAM: 25% of charges
Property tax: 8% of CAM. Average CAM charge: $185/unit/month
ground_truth: CAM breakdown percentages and average charge correct

question: Show lease renewal rates by building.
expected_answer: Tower North: 84% renewal rate, Tower South: 77% renewal, East Wing: 69% renewal
expected_sql: SELECT building_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN renewal_status = 'renewed' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as renewal_rate FROM leases WHERE expiration_date < GETDATE() GROUP BY building_name
contexts: Tower North maintains strong 84% lease renewal rate
Tower South lease renewal rate: 77%
East Wing has lower 69% renewal rate, suggesting retention challenges

question: What events are scheduled in common areas for April?
expected_answer: 7 events: Fitness class (4/2, 4/9, 4/16, 4/23, 4/30), Tenant networking (4/5), Community cleanup (4/20)
expected_sql: SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) as event_count FROM community_events WHERE event_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30' GROUP BY event_name
contexts: April fitness classes scheduled: Tuesdays 6pm in Tower North gym
Tenant networking event April 5 in Tower North lobby
Community cleanup day scheduled April 20

question: Which tenants have expiring parking permits?
expected_answer: 8 tenants with expiring permits: 3 in April, 3 in May, 2 in June. Renewal notices sent.
expected_sql: SELECT MONTH(expiration_date) as month, COUNT(*) as permit_count FROM parking_permits WHERE expiration_date BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-06-30' GROUP BY MONTH(expiration_date)
contexts: 3 parking permits expire in April 2026
3 additional permits expire in May 2026
2 permits expire in June 2026. Renewal notices have been distributed.

question: Show environmental compliance status.
expected_answer: All buildings compliant: Energy Star certified (Tower North, Tower South), Green Building standards (East Wing), no violations.
expected_sql: SELECT building_name, certification_type, compliance_status FROM environmental_certifications WHERE status = 'active'
contexts: Tower North: Energy Star certified, compliant with all EPA standards
Tower South: Energy Star certified, no environmental violations
East Wing: Green Building standards certified, full compliance
ground_truth: All buildings meet or exceed environmental requirements

question: What is the average lease term by unit type?
expected_answer: Studios: 10.2 months avg, 1BR: 11.5 months, 2BR: 12.1 months, 3BR: 12.8 months
expected_sql: SELECT unit_type, ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(month, lease_start_date, lease_end_date)), 1) as avg_lease_months FROM leases GROUP BY unit_type ORDER BY avg_lease_months
contexts: Studio units average 10.2 month lease terms
1-bedroom units: 11.5 month average
2-bedroom units average 12.1 months
3-bedroom units: 12.8 month average lease term
ground_truth: Average lease terms increase with unit size

question: List tenants with pet policy violations.
expected_answer: 2 violations: Unit 207 (unauthorized pet), Unit 508 (exceeds weight limit). Both issued warnings.
expected_sql: SELECT unit_id, violation_type, action_taken FROM pet_violations WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY violation_date DESC
contexts: Unit 207 has unauthorized pet - written warning issued
Unit 508 tenant has pet exceeding weight policy limits - warning sent
ground_truth: 2 pet policy violations documented and addressed

question: What is the multi-family market comparison data?
expected_answer: Market avg: $3,100/month, Portfolio avg: $2,980/month (-3.9%). Portfolio competitive advantage on pricing.
expected_sql: SELECT 'Portfolio' as comparison, AVG(rent) as avg_rent FROM units UNION SELECT 'Market', $3100 FROM market_data
contexts: Regional multi-family market average: $3,100/month
Our portfolio average: $2,980/month
Pricing advantage: -3.9% below market, strong competitive position

question: Show debt service coverage ratio by year.
expected_sql: SELECT year, noi, debt_service, noi / debt_service as dscr FROM financial_metrics WHERE year BETWEEN 2023 AND 2025 ORDER BY year
contexts: 2023 Debt Service Coverage Ratio: 1.45x
2024 DSCR: 1.62x, showing 11.7% improvement
2025 DSCR: 1.78x with continued improvement trajectory
ground_truth: DSCR trend shows healthy debt servicing capacity
